UD COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-19-2012. COUNSEL MEET WITH JUDGE PRO TEM. CASE DOES NOT SETTLE. CONTINUED TO MAR-20-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN 501 FOR TRIAL ASSIGNMENT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, NOT REPORTED (D501)
TRIAL COMMENCED.
TRIAL CONCLUDED. IN 1.0 DAY.
COURT TRIAL ON MAR-20-2012 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MAR-20-2012 BY ELLEN CHAITIN. JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN, CLERK MARIA OLOPERNES-PENA, NOT REPORTED (606).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MICHAEL YANCEY, TRUSTEE OF THE MISSION ST. TRUST DATED AUGUST 2, 2011 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAVANDER CASA, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5528 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED DAILY DAMAGES FROM DECEMBER 19, 2011 TO MARCH 20, 2012 AT $133.33 PER DAY, TOTALING OF $12,266.66. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
